phrases.intent_en: Ask where the platform for local trains is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el andén para trenes locales?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH el ahn-DEN PAH-rah TREH-nehs loh-KAH-lehs?

likely_response.local: Andenes 1 y 2, junto a la cafetería.
likely_response.pronunciation: ahn-DEH-nehs Y HOON-toh AH LAH kah-feh-teh-RÍ-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Platforms one and two, follow the green signs.

responses.english: Platforms one and two, follow the green signs.
responses.phonetic: ahn-DEH-nehs Y HOON-toh AH LAH kah-feh-teh-RÍ-ah
responses.local: Andenes 1 y 2, junto a la cafetería.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where luggage storage is located
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se encuentra la consigna de equipajes?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh seh ehn-KWEN-trah lah kohn-SEE-nyah deh eh-kee-PAH-hes?

likely_response.local: Planta baja, cerca de la salida norte.
likely_response.pronunciation: PLAHN-tah BAH-hah THEHR-kah DEH LAH sah-LEE-dah NOHR-teh
likely_response.translation_en: Ground floor, near the north exit.

responses.english: Ground floor, near the north exit.
responses.phonetic: PLAHN-tah BAH-hah THEHR-kah DEH LAH sah-LEE-dah NOHR-teh
responses.local: Planta baja, cerca de la salida norte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy tickets to France
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde compro billetes para Francia?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh KOM-proh bee-YEH-tes PAH-rah FRAN-syah?

likely_response.local: Ventanilla internacional, al fondo a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: behn-tah-NEEL-lah een-tehr-nah-thee-oh-NAHL AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: International window, at the back on the right.

responses.english: International window, at the back on the right.
responses.phonetic: behn-tah-NEEL-lah een-tehr-nah-thee-oh-NAHL AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Ventanilla internacional, al fondo a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the departure board
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está el panel de salidas de trenes?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh es-TAH el pah-NEHL deh sah-LEE-dahs deh TREH-nehs

likely_response.local: Al fondo del vestíbulo, en la pared central.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh EHN LAH pah-REHD thehnt-RAHL
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the lobby, on the central wall.

responses.english: At the end of the lobby, on the central wall.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh EHN LAH pah-REHD thehnt-RAHL
responses.local: Al fondo del vestíbulo, en la pared central.
